_comment: Tier-2 for fenics nonlinear_pde / NonlinearProblem catalog: dolfinx 0.10 has bcs as keyword-only and petsc_options_prefix REQUIRED. Catalog L542 showed NonlinearProblem(F, u, bcs, petsc_options={...}) — wrong on both counts. Verified 2026-06-01. Note: Tier-2 runner forbid list excludes 'Traceback' here because NonlinearProblem.__del__ prints an Exception-ignored traceback to stderr at GC time on dolfinx 0.10 (separate issue, not a probe failure).
